plugin.name: 1001Albums
plugin.title: 1001 Albums you must hear before you die
plugin.desc: A book with 1001 albums chosen by a panel of music critics to be the most important and influential in popular music. This plugin will help you listen to them all. One album a day.
plugin.changes: v1.6.0: add support for Material's Home Extras. v1.6.1: auto update Home Extra.
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: Bandcamp
plugin.title: Band's Campout
plugin.desc: Browse and play artists and tracks from bandcamp.com.
plugin.changes: v1.12.0: add support for Material's Home Extras; allow deletion of recent searches and listens (thanks @jbylsma!).
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: ClientCleanup
plugin.title: Client Cleanup
plugin.desc: Remove orphaned client configurations
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: CrackThatMF
plugin.title: Musical Fidelity Remote Access Enabler
plugin.desc: This plugin tries to enable SSH on your Musical Fidelity Encore device. USE AT YOUR OWN RISK! DO NOT USE IF YOU ALREADY HAVE SSH ACCESS TO YOUR MF. Once access has been successfully established, you can uninstall the plugin again.
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: DocsetCreator
plugin.title: Create docsets for Dash
plugin.desc: Export your music library as a Docset to be used with Dash (http://kapeli.com/dash). This allows you to quickly search your library on your Mac computer without firing up the Logitech Media Server web UI.
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: DRS
plugin.title: Radio SRF Meta Information
plugin.desc: Swiss Radio SRF Stream Meta Information Parser
Schweizer Radio SRF Meta Informations Parser
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: IgnoreDirREManager
plugin.title: Ignore files and folders
Dateien und Ordner ausschliessen
plugin.desc: Set a regular expression to ignore files and folders when scanning or browsing folders.
Schliesse Dateien und Ordner mittels Regulärer Ausdrücke beim Durchsuchen der Musik aus.
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: ImageProxy
plugin.title: Image Proxy configuration helper
plugin.desc: Allows you to configure external image proxies to be used by LMS. Offload the heavy image processing to an external service.
plugin.changes: v1.1.0: Add option to add headers for external image proxies; improve daemon monitoring. v1.1.1: always define an output format and quality (wsrv.nl)
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: LastMix
plugin.title: LastMix - Don't Stop The Music support using Last.fm.
plugin.desc: LastMix allows you to create Last.fm based mixes for the "Don't Stop The Music" plugin.
plugin.changes: v2.4.0 - Add "Artist Mix" artist menu item; add back a "Love Track" handler. v2.4.1 - Fix compatibility with older LMS versions; bug fixes. v2.4.2 - Fix username when loving a track.
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: M6Encore
plugin.title: Musical Fidelity M6 Encore
plugin.desc: Support for Musical Fidelity M6 Encore to your LMS
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: MusicArtistInfo
plugin.title: Music and Artist Information
plugin.desc: Read album reviews, artist biographies, related artists, song lyrics, see artist pictures and much more.
plugin.changes: v1.24.0 - improve support for localized content, let use define preferred language. v1.24.1 - fix following Wikipedia redirects. v1.25.0 - provide track (or album) reviews for radio tracks where we don't have album information. v1.26.1 - use album title to help disamibugate artists by name.
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: MusicInfoSCR
plugin.title: Music Information Screen
plugin.desc: The Music Information Screen plugin allows customization of the player's Now Playing screen and other elements.
Das Musik-Informations Plugin erlaubt es, den Bildschirm weitgehend selber zu gestalten.
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: NoSetup
plugin.title: Enable/disable access to server settings
Einstellungen aus-/einblenden
plugin.desc: This plugins allows you to disable access to the settings pages from the Squeezebox Server's web interface.
Mit diesem Plugin können Sie die Einstellungsseiten des Squeezebox Servers ausblenden.
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: Phishin
plugin.title: phish.in'
plugin.desc: phish.in' - access to Live Phish Audio Streams
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: PiCorePlayer
plugin.title: piCorePlayer Support
plugin.desc: Access pCP Settings pages from within the LMS Settings.
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: PlayHistory
plugin.title: What Was That Tune?
plugin.desc: Keep track of what was playing while you were too busy to check the display.
plugin.changes: v1.0.10 - add album information when available (thanks Paul Webster!)
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: RadioParadise
plugin.title: Radio Paradise
plugin.desc: Play the lossless, interactive Radio Paradise streams!
plugin.changes: v3.6.0 - add shortcut to play best quality stream of each mix. v3.6.2 - prevent redirect loop. v3.6.3 - try to skip invalid announcements; bug fixes.
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: Spotty
plugin.title: Spotify for Squeezebox. Still Spotty.
plugin.desc: The next generation Spotify implementation for Squeezebox.
plugin.changes: v4.60.0: Fix authorization compatibility with latest Spotify API changes. v4.60.6: improve compatibility with restricted custom client IDs (thanks @urknall!). v4.60.7: fix error handling on http failures.
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: MHCPAN
plugin.title: CPAN Modules (Windows)
CPAN Module (Windows)
plugin.desc: Some perl modules for Windows that are required by some of my plugins (Meteo, AlbumReview, Biography)
Perl-Module für Windows, die für einige meiner Plugins benötigt werden (Meteo, AlbumReview, Biography)
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

plugin.name: WalkWithMe
plugin.title: Music Walk With Me
Musik marschier mit mir
plugin.desc: Continue your listening on a different player - easily.
Einfach die aktuelle Wiedergabeliste auf einem anderen Gerät weiterspielen.
plugin.changes: 1.1.0: add option to grab a playlist form another player, rather than pushing it; try to improve behaviour when moving a RandomPlay list. v1.1.1: add CLI support. v1.1.2: improved French translation. v1.1.3: sort players by name
plugin.creator: Michael Herger

patch.name: VersionComparisonFix
patch.title: Version Comparison Fix
patch.desc: Fixes the version comparison which is broken in Radio firmware 7.7.x. This issue leads to the Radio refusing to connect to LMS 8.
patch.creator: Michael Herger
